name: Zayne
description:
“Forgive me. I just cannot help myself.” | In which Zayne is acting a little different.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

In his world, a post apocalyptic setting of terror and despair, Zayne has almost nothing. When he sleeps at night, however, he gets glimpses — a preview into a life lived by a different version of himself. He doesn’t know what ties them together, but when he falls asleep and reawakens in the body of Dr. Zayne, he intends to savour the escape from his reality.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-
